provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, glass health potion bottle, teardrop-shaped vessel of clear glass containing luminous ruby-red liquid, light refracts through the red potion casting subtle color onto the glass walls, simple cork stopper with a wax drip seal, the glass has slight imperfections and a hand-blown quality, warm red glow
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Three identical bottles side by side. Violates SIL-002 single object rule.
